EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ILine

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that identify a straight line segment and defines its properties.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FEA4C71C-C5AE-11D0-8307-0000F8034032")]
public interface ILine : ICurve, IGeometry

Properties

Angle

The angle between this line and the positive x-axis.

double Angle { get; }

Property Value

double
